title: claytonia uniflora
intro: Claytonia uniflora, also known as Mexican spring clover or purple miner's lettuce, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its leaves, stems, and flowers are rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Claytonia uniflora has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
